ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number in the project documentation */,
  "decision_point" TEXT /* Description of decision points for the project */,
  "locality_impact" TEXT /* Assessment of potential locality impact */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., bridge, railway) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the project location */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project phase */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this phase belongs to */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the project phase (e.g., Planning, Construction) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the phase (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic location */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this location is associated with */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is located */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the project location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location features */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "nearest_city" TEXT /* Nearest city to the project location */,
  "distance_to_nearest_city" REAL /* Distance to the nearest city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_locations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this engagement relates to */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder providing feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the stakeholder */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., meeting, email) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the stakeholder feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholder_engagement_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Environmental, Social) */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the assessment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the findings */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance document (e.g., Permit, License) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the document was submitted */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the document */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the document was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the budget is allocated to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of budget allocated */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget allocation */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget allocation (e.g., labor, materials) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor responsible for the budget allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this risk is associated with */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the risk */,
  "likelihood" TEXT /* Likelihood of occurrence (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Mitigation strategy to address the risk */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of the risk (e.g., environmental, financial) */,
  "risk_status" TEXT /* Current status of the risk (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_risks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report relates to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Progress, Final) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Approved) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., Manager, Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this municipality is associated with */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "municipality_type" TEXT /* Type of municipality (e.g., city, town) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_municipalities_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this milestone is associated with */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., Achieved, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this collaborator is involved in */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
